response.original_title: Vertrek van de 5e Mussertcompagnie voor opname in de Nachrichtentruppe van de Luftwaffe
response.overview: NSB propaganda film from 1942 about the members of the Fifth Mussert Company marching through Utrecht. On the eve of their departure to the Luftwaffe Nachrichtentruppen, of which they are to form a part. They also march in formation past the NSB headquarters on the Maliebaan.
response.title: Vertrek van de 5e Mussertcompagnie voor opname in de Nachrichtentruppe van de Luftwaffe
